plan_under_test: Stop legacy mark-scheme answer blocks before a missed neighboring question row on the same page.
expected_initial_failure: The new test fails before implementation because the legacy answer block includes later neighboring question text.
what_passing_proves: Legacy mark-scheme block and region bounds stop before a later missed top-level question row.
Existing question-detection behavior remains compatible with the new boundary check.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not prove preliminary notes pages are ignored.
It does not prove next-anchor-only following pages are skipped.
risk_of_bad_tests: The synthetic row layout targets one failure shape and needs follow-up real-PDF evidence for historical papers.

new_tests.purpose: Proves a legacy mark-scheme question block stops before a later missed top-level question.

expected_pre_implementation_result: The block includes the later neighboring question text before the new boundary logic is added.
success_criteria: The new focused test fails before implementation.
The focused test passes after implementation.
